zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于窄幅震荡偏强结构，价格围绕1750-1760区间整理，整体多头略占优势但动能不足，短线进入盘整阶段等待方向突破

SMA20位于1747附近形成短期支撑，价格略高于均线显示多头仍守稳；MACD柱值为正但信号线未给出，动能偏弱，缺乏趋势加速

上方阻力关注1760-1765区间，下方支撑在1747与1750附近形成密集支撑带，若跌破可能回测1735区域需观察突破方向

操作建议以区间交易为主，未有效突破1760前不宜追多，可在1750下方分批低吸，跌破1747则需谨慎控制风险并设置止损保护

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETHUSD shows tight consolidation around 1750–1760 after minimal 24h change -0.07%, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Price action remains range-bound following a mild recovery above the 20-day SMA at 1747.99. Short-term structure suggests neutral-to-slightly bullish bias as higher lows stabilize near 1751. However, momentum lacks conviction, and breakout confirmation is needed to establish directional trend beyond the current compression zone.

Momentum indicators present mixed signals. MACD reads 13.0090702, suggesting modest positive momentum, but absence of a signal line prevents a full crossover assessment. RSI is unavailable, limiting overbought/oversold evaluation. Price holding above SMA(20) at 1747.992 supports short-term bullish undertone, yet flattening volatility implies weakening trend strength. Overall, indicators point to consolidation rather than a decisive directional impulse. Volume confirmation remains limited in current data.

Key support is established near 1751, aligning closely with the session low, with stronger structural support at the 20-day SMA around 1747.99. A sustained break below this zone could expose downside pressure toward 1735–1725. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1760.52, the recent high, with psychological resistance near 1760–1765. Price compression between these levels signals an impending volatility expansion.

Trading strategy favors range-bound approaches until a breakout confirms direction. Short-term traders may consider buying near support 1751–1748 with tight risk control below 1745, targeting resistance at 1760–1765. Alternatively, rejection near resistance may offer short scalping opportunities. Swing traders should wait for a decisive close above 1760 or below 1748 to validate trend continuation. Risk management remains critical given low volatility and compressed price structure.
